race.comment: TALLADEGA GIRL (7) is a promising type who scored at her last run before a break five months ago over 1000m at Sandown-Hillside. Fitter for a trio of recent jumpouts and can make a bright return. LONSTAR (5) is back from a spell of four months and does go well when fresh, including a win to launch last campaign over 1000m at Ballarat. Strips fitter of two jumpouts and has found the right race to kick off the campaign. PRINCE OF BROOKY (3) returns for the Burke yard and was in good touch last campaign. Fitter for two jumpouts and and gets an important 2kg claim. Can make a bright return. TITAN OF CHOICE (4) is fit and looks best of the rest with McNeil reuniting.
